name: 系统配置查询
description: 查询系统自身的配置数据，包括意图、功能、步骤和参数，用于系统自检和演示
keywords: 系统配置,意图列表,功能列表,步骤查询,参数查询,自检,演示,系统查询,SQLite

steps.label: 查询意图列表
steps.sqlText: SELECT i.Id AS "编号", i.Name AS "意图名称", i.Category AS "分类", i.Description AS "描述", i.Keywords AS "关键词", CASE WHEN i.IsActive = 1 THEN '启用' ELSE '停用' END AS "状态", i.CreatedAt AS "创建时间" FROM Intents i WHERE (@Keyword IS NULL OR i.Name LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%' OR i.Description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%' OR i.Keywords LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%') ORDER BY i.Category, i.Name
steps.expectMessage: 未找到匹配的意图，请输入关键词搜索

steps.displayConfig: {"columns":["编号","意图名称","分类","描述","关键词","状态","创建时间"]}

steps.label: 按分类统计意图数量
steps.sqlText: SELECT i.Category AS "分类", COUNT(*) AS "意图数量" FROM Intents i GROUP BY i.Category ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

steps.label: 查询功能列表
steps.sqlText: SELECT f.Id AS "编号", f.Name AS "功能名称", i.Name AS "所属意图", f.Description AS "描述", f.DataSource AS "数据源", f.SortOrder AS "排序" FROM Functions f JOIN Intents i ON f.IntentId = i.Id WHERE (@IntentName IS NULL OR i.Name LIKE '%' || @IntentName || '%') ORDER BY i.Name, f.SortOrder

steps.displayConfig: {"columns":["编号","功能名称","所属意图","描述","数据源","排序"]}

steps.label: 查询步骤列表
steps.sqlText: SELECT s.Id AS "编号", s.SortOrder AS "排序", s.StepType AS "步骤类型", s.Label AS "标签", s.ResultVar AS "结果变量", s.ExpectOperator AS "预期操作符", s.ExpectValue AS "预期值", s.ExpectOnFail AS "失败处理", s.ExpectTarget AS "跳转目标" FROM FlowSteps s JOIN Functions f ON s.FunctionId = f.Id WHERE f.Name LIKE '%' || @FunctionName || '%' ORDER BY s.FunctionId, s.SortOrder
steps.expectMessage: 未找到功能 {@FunctionName} 的步骤

steps.displayConfig: {"columns":["编号","排序","步骤类型","标签","结果变量","预期操作符","预期值","失败处理","跳转目标"]}

steps.label: 查询步骤SQL
steps.sqlText: SELECT s.Id AS "编号", s.SqlText AS "SQL内容", s.DisplayTitle AS "展示标题", s.DisplaySource AS "展示变量", s.DisplayConfig AS "展示配置" FROM FlowSteps s JOIN Functions f ON s.FunctionId = f.Id WHERE f.Name LIKE '%' || @FunctionName || '%' AND s.SqlText IS NOT NULL AND s.SqlText != '' ORDER BY s.FunctionId, s.SortOrder

steps.displayConfig: {"columns":["编号","SQL内容","展示标题","展示变量","展示配置"]}

steps.label: 查询参数列表
steps.sqlText: SELECT p.Id AS "编号", p.Name AS "参数名", p.Label AS "显示标签", p.ControlType AS "控件类型", p.IsRequired AS "必填", p.DefaultValue AS "默认值", f.Name AS "所属功能" FROM FunctionParameters p JOIN Functions f ON p.FunctionId = f.Id WHERE (@FunctionName IS NULL OR f.Name LIKE '%' || @FunctionName || '%') ORDER BY f.Name, p.SortOrder

steps.displayConfig: {"columns":["编号","参数名","显示标签","控件类型","必填","默认值","所属功能"]}

steps.label: 查询最近日志
steps.sqlText: SELECT q.Id AS "编号", q.InputText AS "输入内容", q.Parameters AS "参数", q.Similarity AS "相似度", q.ElapsedMs AS "耗时(ms)", q.ExecutedAt AS "执行时间" FROM QueryLog q WHERE (@Keyword IS NULL OR q.InputText LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%') ORDER BY q.ExecutedAt DESC LIMIT 50

steps.displayConfig: {"columns":["编号","输入内容","参数","相似度","耗时(ms)","执行时间"]}

steps.label: 系统概览统计
steps.sqlText: SELECT '意图数量' AS "统计项", CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) AS "数值" FROM Intents UNION ALL SELECT '功能数量', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM Functions UNION ALL SELECT '步骤数量', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM FlowSteps UNION ALL SELECT '参数数量', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM FunctionParameters UNION ALL SELECT '数据源数量', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM DataSourceConfig UNION ALL SELECT '查询日志条数', CAST(COUNT(*) AS VARCHAR) FROM QueryLog

steps.label: 按步骤类型统计
steps.sqlText: SELECT s.StepType AS "步骤类型", COUNT(*) AS "数量" FROM FlowSteps s GROUP BY s.StepType ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
